baseline: v0.23.0 Conversation Intelligence & Trusted AI Foundation
implemented_this_release: Atomic pending-confirmation routing and save-once sleep transactions with view and undo actions
First-class sleep records with direct Health Library logging and wake-date display
Concrete Review Questions showing source, proposal, uncertainty, and explicit actions
Correct change-language for metric tiles plus display duplicate suppression and duplicate checks
Independent three-stack Dashboard composition with improved coaching readability
Actionable user-facing insights, calendar follow-ups with defined downstream use, and no internal parsing language
Consistent labeled Activity Library graphs with explicit insufficient-data explanations
Equivalent optional RPE, pain, technique, notes, and injury-context fields in workout creation and editing
One shared exercise recommendation object across Coach’s Eye and Activity Library
Labs within Health and Pattern Lab within Insights
Durable Potential Health Events included in AI relationship context and manual AI packets
Regression coverage for sleep parsing, idempotent confirmation, undo, navigation, layout, and release structure
inherited_verified_evidence: Workbook transaction, preflight, source replacement backup, and 188-observation no-change regression from v0.20.4 evidence
known_issues: Live Google Drive, Google Calendar, AI-provider, service-worker, credentialed, and deployed-origin behavior requires environment verification
Real-workbook regression tests require ZEKE_TEST_DATA_ROOT and were not executed without that external fixture
Physical-device accessibility and real mobile-browser verification remains outstanding
Potential Health Event reclassification remains review-driven; no automatic clinical conclusions are made
Global activity rename, merge, and legacy taxonomy migration remain deferred
next_review_items: Deployed-origin acceptance test of sleep save/view/undo and Google persistence
Live Calendar follow-up question and downstream record-update verification
Real-workbook regression with the protected external fixture
Independent visual review of Dashboard information density after deployed data load
required_regression_checks: real-data workbook regression when fixture is available
final ZIP reopened and byte-compared with staging
